title: Smoky Peruvian Oat Bowl
description: A hearty and flavorful oat bowl inspired by the bold flavors of Peru. Perfect for a quick and nutritious breakfast or snack.

ingredients.name: Peruvian-Style Roasted Sweet Potatoes
ingredients.notes: Roasted with a drizzle of olive oil and a pinch of salt

ingredients.name: Smoked Paprika
ingredients.notes: Smoked for added depth of flavor

instructions: Roast the sweet potatoes for 20-25 minutes, or until tender.
In a medium saucepan, bring 2 cups of water to a boil. Add the oats and reduce heat to a simmer.
Cook the oats for 5-7 minutes, or until they have absorbed most of the water and have a creamy consistency.
In a small pan, heat a drizzle of olive oil over medium heat. Add the smoked paprika, chili flakes, and cumin. Cook for 1-2 minutes, stirring constantly.
Stir the spice mixture into the cooked oats. Season with salt to taste.
Spoon the oats into a bowl and top with roasted sweet potatoes. Garnish with chopped cilantro.
